  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Severe water hammer (hydraulic shock) occurs immediately after the fixture valve closes."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install water hammer arrestors compliant with ASSE 1010 at the quick-closing valves.",
    "Ensure PEX and copper piping are properly secured with hangers and straps to prevent movement."
  ],
  "rationale": "The audio recording clearly captures a valve closing followed by a loud, distinct metallic banging sound characteristic of water hammer. This hydraulic shock can damage joints, fittings, and appliances over time, violating standard plumbing codes that require control of water hammer.",
  "references": [
    "IPC Section 604.9 (Water hammer)",
    "UPC Section 609.10 (Water Hammer Arrestors)",
    "ASSE 1010 (Water Hammer Arrestors)"
  ]
}
